verses.latin_vulgate: Hæ sunt generationes filiorum Noë, Sem, Cham et Japheth : natique sunt eis filii post diluvium.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאֵ֙לֶּה֙ תּוֹלְדֹ֣ת בְּנֵי־נֹ֔חַ שֵׁ֖ם חָ֣ם וָיָ֑פֶת וַיִּוָּלְד֥וּ לָהֶ֛ם בָּנִ֖ים אַחַ֥ר הַמַּבּֽוּל׃
verses.king_james: Now these are the generations of the sons of Noah, Shem, Ham, and Japheth: and unto them were sons born after the flood.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filii Japheth : Gomer, et Magog, et Madai, et Javan, et Thubal, et Mosoch, et Thiras.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּנֵ֣י יֶ֔פֶת גֹּ֣מֶר וּמָג֔וֹג וּמָדַ֖י וְיָוָ֣ן וְתֻבָ֑ל וּמֶ֖שֶׁךְ וְתִירָֽס׃
verses.king_james: The sons of Japheth; Gomer, and Magog, and Madai, and Javan, and Tubal, and Meshech, and Tiras.

verses.latin_vulgate: Porro filii Gomer : Ascenez et Riphath et Thogorma.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּבְנֵ֖י גֹּ֑מֶר אַשְׁכְּנַ֥ז וְרִיפַ֖ת וְתֹגַרְמָֽה׃
verses.king_james: And the sons of Gomer; Ashkenaz, and Riphath, and Togarmah.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filii autem Javan : Elisa et Tharsis, Cetthim et Dodanim.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּבְנֵ֥י יָוָ֖ן אֱלִישָׁ֣ה וְתַרְשִׁ֑ישׁ כִּתִּ֖ים וְדֹדָנִֽים׃
verses.king_james: And the sons of Javan; Elishah, and Tarshish, Kittim, and Dodanim.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ab his divisæ sunt insulæ gentium in regionibus suis, unusquisque secundum linguam suam et familias suas in nationibus suis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מֵ֠אֵ֠לֶּה נִפְרְד֞וּ אִיֵּ֤י הַגּוֹיִם֙ בְּאַרְצֹתָ֔ם אִ֖ישׁ לִלְשֹׁנ֑וֹ לְמִשְׁפְּחֹתָ֖ם בְּגוֹיֵהֶֽם׃
verses.king_james: By these were the isles of the Gentiles divided in their lands; every one after his tongue, after their families, in their nations.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filii autem Cham : Chus, et Mesraim, et Phuth, et Chanaan.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּבְנֵ֖י חָ֑ם כּ֥וּשׁ וּמִצְרַ֖יִם וּפ֥וּט וּכְנָֽעַן׃
verses.king_james: And the sons of Ham; Cush, and Mizraim, and Phut, and Canaan.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filii Chus : Saba, et Hevila, et Sabatha, et Regma, et Sabatacha. Filii Regma : Saba et Dadan.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּבְנֵ֣י כ֔וּשׁ סְבָא֙ וַֽחֲוִילָ֔ה וְסַבְתָּ֥ה וְרַעְמָ֖ה וְסַבְתְּכָ֑א וּבְנֵ֥י רַעְמָ֖ה שְׁבָ֥א וּדְדָֽן׃
verses.king_james: And the sons of Cush; Seba, and Havilah, and Sabtah, and Raamah, and Sabtecha: and the sons of Raamah; Sheba, and Dedan.

verses.latin_vulgate: Porro Chus genuit Nemrod : ipse cœpit esse potens in terra,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְכ֖וּשׁ יָלַ֣ד אֶת־נִמְרֹ֑ד ה֣וּא הֵחֵ֔ל לִֽהְי֥וֹת גִּבֹּ֖ר בָּאָֽרֶץ׃
verses.king_james: And Cush begat Nimrod: he began to be a mighty one in the earth.

verses.latin_vulgate: et erat robustus venator coram Domino. Ob hoc exivit proverbium : Quasi Nemrod robustus venator coram Domino.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הֽוּא־הָיָ֥ה גִבֹּֽר־צַ֖יִד לִפְנֵ֣י יְהֹוָ֑ה עַל־כֵּן֙ יֵֽאָמַ֔ר כְּנִמְרֹ֛ד גִּבּ֥וֹר צַ֖יִד לִפְנֵ֥י יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.king_james: He was a mighty hunter before the Lord: wherefore it is said, Even as Nimrod the mighty hunter before the Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: Fuit autem principium regni ejus Babylon, et Arach et Achad, et Chalanne, in terra Sennaar.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַתְּהִ֨י רֵאשִׁ֤ית מַמְלַכְתּוֹ֙ בָּבֶ֔ל וְאֶ֖רֶךְ וְאַכַּ֣ד וְכַלְנֵ֑ה בְּאֶ֖רֶץ שִׁנְעָֽר׃
verses.king_james: And the beginning of his kingdom was Babel, and Erech, and Accad, and Calneh, in the land of Shinar.

verses.latin_vulgate: De terra illa egressus est Assur, et ædificavit Niniven, et plateas civitatis, et Chale.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מִן־הָאָ֥רֶץ הַהִ֖וא יָצָ֣א אַשּׁ֑וּר וַיִּ֙בֶן֙ אֶת־נִ֣ינְוֵ֔ה וְאֶת־רְחֹבֹ֥ת עִ֖יר וְאֶת־כָּֽלַח׃
verses.king_james: Out of that land went forth Asshur, and builded Nineveh, and the city Rehoboth, and Calah,

verses.latin_vulgate: Resen quoque inter Niniven et Chale : hæc est civitas magna.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְֽאֶת־רֶ֔סֶן בֵּ֥ין נִֽינְוֵ֖ה וּבֵ֣ין כָּ֑לַח הִ֖וא הָעִ֥יר הַגְּדֹלָֽה׃
verses.king_james: And Resen between Nineveh and Calah: the same is a great city.

verses.latin_vulgate: At vero Mesraim genuit Ludim, et Anamim et Laabim, Nephthuim,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּמִצְרַ֡יִם יָלַ֞ד אֶת־לוּדִ֧ים וְאֶת־עֲנָמִ֛ים וְאֶת־לְהָבִ֖ים וְאֶת־נַפְתֻּחִֽים׃
verses.king_james: And Mizraim begat Ludim, and Anamim, and Lehabim, and Naphtuhim,

verses.latin_vulgate: et Phetrusim, et Chasluim : de quibus egressi sunt Philisthiim et Caphtorim.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְֽאֶת־פַּתְרֻסִ֞ים וְאֶת־כַּסְלֻחִ֗ים אֲשֶׁ֨ר יָצְא֥וּ מִשָּׁ֛ם פְּלִשְׁתִּ֖ים וְאֶת־כַּפְתֹּרִֽים׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: And Pathrusim, and Casluhim, (out of whom came Philistim,) and Caphtorim.

verses.latin_vulgate: Chanaan autem genuit Sidonem primogenitum suum. Hethæum,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּכְנַ֗עַן יָלַ֛ד אֶת־צִידֹ֥ן בְּכֹר֖וֹ וְאֶת־חֵֽת׃
verses.king_james: And Canaan begat Sidon his firstborn, and Heth,

verses.latin_vulgate: et Jebusæum, et Amorrhæum, Gergesæum,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאֶת־הַיְבוּסִי֙ וְאֶת־הָ֣אֱמֹרִ֔י וְאֵ֖ת הַגִּרְגָּשִֽׁי׃
verses.king_james: And the Jebusite, and the Amorite, and the Girgasite,

verses.latin_vulgate: Hevæum, et Aracæum : Sinæum,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאֶת־הַֽחִוִּ֥י וְאֶת־הַֽעַרְקִ֖י וְאֶת־הַסִּינִֽי׃
verses.king_james: And the Hivite, and the Arkite, and the Sinite,

verses.latin_vulgate: et Aradium, Samaræum, et Amathæum : et post hæc disseminati sunt populi Chananæorum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאֶת־הָֽאַרְוָדִ֥י וְאֶת־הַצְּמָרִ֖י וְאֶת־הַֽחֲמָתִ֑י וְאַחַ֣ר נָפֹ֔צוּ מִשְׁפְּח֖וֹת הַֽכְּנַעֲנִֽי׃
verses.king_james: And the Arvadite, and the Zemarite, and the Hamathite: and afterward were the families of the Canaanites spread abroad.

verses.latin_vulgate: Factique sunt termini Chanaan venientibus a Sidone Geraram usque Gazam, donec ingrediaris Sodomam et Gomorrham, et Adamam, et Seboim usque Lesa.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְהִ֞י גְּב֤וּל הַֽכְּנַעֲנִי֙ מִצִּידֹ֔ן בֹּאֲכָ֥ה גְרָ֖רָה עַד־עַזָּ֑ה בֹּאֲכָ֞ה סְדֹ֧מָה וַעֲמֹרָ֛ה וְאַדְמָ֥ה וּצְבֹיִ֖ם עַד־לָֽשַׁע׃
verses.king_james: And the border of the Canaanites was from Sidon, as thou comest to Gerar, unto Gaza; as thou goest, unto Sodom, and Gomorrah, and Admah, and Zeboim, even unto Lasha.

verses.latin_vulgate: Hi sunt filii Cham in cognationibus, et linguis, et generationibus, terrisque et gentibus suis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֵ֣לֶּה בְנֵי־חָ֔ם לְמִשְׁפְּחֹתָ֖ם לִלְשֹֽׁנֹתָ֑ם בְּאַרְצֹתָ֖ם בְּגוֹיֵהֶֽם׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: These are the sons of Ham, after their families, after their tongues, in their countries, and in their nations.

verses.latin_vulgate: De Sem quoque nati sunt, patre omnium filiorum Heber, fratre Japheth majore.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּלְשֵׁ֥ם יֻלַּ֖ד גַּם־ה֑וּא אֲבִי֙ כׇּל־בְּנֵי־עֵ֔בֶר אֲחִ֖י יֶ֥פֶת הַגָּדֽוֹל׃
verses.king_james: Unto Shem also, the father of all the children of Eber, the brother of Japheth the elder, even to him were children born.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filii Sem : Ælam, et Assur, et Arphaxad, et Lud, et Aram.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּנֵ֥י שֵׁ֖ם עֵילָ֣ם וְאַשּׁ֑וּר וְאַרְפַּכְשַׁ֖ד וְל֥וּד וַֽאֲרָֽם׃
verses.king_james: The children of Shem; Elam, and Asshur, and Arphaxad, and Lud, and Aram.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filii Aram : Us, et Hul, et Gether, et Mes.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּבְנֵ֖י אֲרָ֑ם ע֥וּץ וְח֖וּל וְגֶ֥תֶר וָמַֽשׁ׃
verses.king_james: And the children of Aram; Uz, and Hul, and Gether, and Mash.

verses.latin_vulgate: At vero Arphaxad genuit Sale, de quo ortus est Heber.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאַרְפַּכְשַׁ֖ד יָלַ֣ד אֶת־שָׁ֑לַח וְשֶׁ֖לַח יָלַ֥ד אֶת־עֵֽבֶר׃
verses.king_james: And Arphaxad begat Salah; and Salah begat Eber.

verses.latin_vulgate: Natique sunt Heber filii duo : nomen uni Phaleg, eo quod in diebus ejus divisa sit terra : et nomen fratris ejus Jectan.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּלְעֵ֥בֶר יֻלַּ֖ד שְׁנֵ֣י בָנִ֑ים שֵׁ֣ם הָֽאֶחָ֞ד פֶּ֗לֶג כִּ֤י בְיָמָיו֙ נִפְלְגָ֣ה הָאָ֔רֶץ וְשֵׁ֥ם אָחִ֖יו יׇקְטָֽן׃
verses.king_james: And unto Eber were born two sons: the name of one was Peleg; for in his days was the earth divided; and his brother’s name was Joktan.

verses.latin_vulgate: Qui Jectan genuit Elmodad, et Saleph, et Asarmoth, Jare,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְיׇקְטָ֣ן יָלַ֔ד אֶת־אַלְמוֹדָ֖ד וְאֶת־שָׁ֑לֶף וְאֶת־חֲצַרְמָ֖וֶת וְאֶת־יָֽרַח׃
verses.king_james: And Joktan begat Almodad, and Sheleph, and Hazarmaveth, and Jerah,

verses.latin_vulgate: et Aduram, et Uzal, et Decla,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאֶת־הֲדוֹרָ֥ם וְאֶת־אוּזָ֖ל וְאֶת־דִּקְלָֽה׃
verses.king_james: And Hadoram, and Uzal, and Diklah,

verses.latin_vulgate: et Ebal, et Abimaël, Saba,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאֶת־עוֹבָ֥ל וְאֶת־אֲבִֽימָאֵ֖ל וְאֶת־שְׁבָֽא׃
verses.king_james: And Obal, and Abimael, and Sheba,

verses.latin_vulgate: et Ophir, et Hevila, et Jobab : omnes isti, filii Jectan.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאֶת־אוֹפִ֥ר וְאֶת־חֲוִילָ֖ה וְאֶת־יוֹבָ֑ב כׇּל־אֵ֖לֶּה בְּנֵ֥י יׇקְטָֽן׃
verses.king_james: And Ophir, and Havilah, and Jobab: all these were the sons of Joktan.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et facta est habitatio eorum de Messa pergentibus usque Sephar montem orientalem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְהִ֥י מוֹשָׁבָ֖ם מִמֵּשָׁ֑א בֹּאֲכָ֥ה סְפָ֖רָה הַ֥ר הַקֶּֽדֶם׃
verses.king_james: And their dwelling was from Mesha, as thou goest unto Sephar a mount of the east.

verses.latin_vulgate: Isti filii Sem secundum cognationes, et linguas, et regiones in gentibus suis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֵ֣לֶּה בְנֵי־שֵׁ֔ם לְמִשְׁפְּחֹתָ֖ם לִלְשֹׁנֹתָ֑ם בְּאַרְצֹתָ֖ם לְגוֹיֵהֶֽם׃
verses.king_james: These are the sons of Shem, after their families, after their tongues, in their lands, after their nations.

verses.latin_vulgate: Hæ familiæ Noë juxta populos et nationes suas. Ab his divisæ sunt gentes in terra post diluvium.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֵ֣לֶּה מִשְׁפְּחֹ֧ת בְּנֵי־נֹ֛חַ לְתוֹלְדֹתָ֖ם בְּגוֹיֵהֶ֑ם וּמֵאֵ֜לֶּה נִפְרְד֧וּ הַגּוֹיִ֛ם בָּאָ֖רֶץ אַחַ֥ר הַמַּבּֽוּל׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: These are the families of the sons of Noah, after their generations, in their nations: and by these were the nations divided in the earth after the flood.
